panels.description: Expected vs actual closed candles for the selected symbols. bars_back is shared across all timeframes.

targets.rawSql:
WITH params AS (
    SELECT greatest('${bars_back}'::bigint, 1) AS bars_back
),
selected_symbols AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT symbol
    FROM swap_ohlcv_p
    WHERE '$__all' IN (${symbol:singlequote})
       OR symbol IN (${symbol:singlequote})
),
step_tf AS (
    SELECT * FROM (VALUES
        ('1H', 3600000::bigint),
        ('4H', 14400000::bigint)
    ) AS t(timeframe, step_ms)
),
step_expected AS (
    SELECT s.symbol, st.timeframe, gs AS expected_ts_ms
    FROM selected_symbols s
    CROSS JOIN step_tf st
    CROSS JOIN params p
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL generate_series(
        (floor(extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000 / st.step_ms) * st.step_ms - p.bars_back * st.step_ms)::bigint,
        (floor(extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000 / st.step_ms) * st.step_ms - st.step_ms)::bigint,
        st.step_ms
    ) AS gs
),
cal_expected AS (
    SELECT s.symbol, '1D' AS timeframe,
        (extract(epoch FROM (date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - (gs.n || ' day')::interval)) * 1000)::bigint AS expected_ts_ms
    FROM selected_symbols s CROSS JOIN params p CROSS JOIN generate_series(1, p.bars_back) AS gs(n)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT s.symbol, '1W' AS timeframe,
        (extract(epoch FROM (date_trunc('week', now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - (gs.n || ' week')::interval)) * 1000)::bigint AS expected_ts_ms
    FROM selected_symbols s CROSS JOIN params p CROSS JOIN generate_series(1, p.bars_back) AS gs(n)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT s.symbol, '1M' AS timeframe,
        (extract(epoch FROM (date_trunc('month', now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - (gs.n || ' month')::interval)) * 1000)::bigint AS expected_ts_ms
    FROM selected_symbols s CROSS JOIN params p CROSS JOIN generate_series(1, p.bars_back) AS gs(n)
),
expected AS (
    SELECT symbol, timeframe, expected_ts_ms FROM step_expected
    UNION ALL
    SELECT symbol, timeframe, expected_ts_ms FROM cal_expected
),
actual AS (
    SELECT e.symbol, e.timeframe,
        count(e.expected_ts_ms) AS expected_rows,
        count(o.timestamp) AS actual_rows,
        max(o.timestamp) AS last_ts_ms
    FROM expected e
    LEFT JOIN swap_ohlcv_p o
        ON o.symbol = e.symbol
       AND o.timeframe = e.timeframe
       AND o.timestamp = e.expected_ts_ms
    GROUP BY e.symbol, e.timeframe
)
SELECT
    symbol,
    timeframe,
    expected_rows,
    actual_rows,
    expected_rows - actual_rows AS missing_rows,
    round(100.0 * actual_rows / nullif(expected_rows, 0), 2) AS fill_pct,
    to_timestamp(last_ts_ms / 1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS last_candle_utc,
    to_timestamp(last_ts_ms / 1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai' AS last_candle_cst
FROM actual
ORDER BY fill_pct ASC, symbol, timeframe;

panels.title: Candle Coverage by Symbol

panels.description: Aggregated closed-candle coverage by timeframe for the selected symbols.

targets.rawSql:
WITH params AS (
    SELECT greatest('${bars_back}'::bigint, 1) AS bars_back
),
selected_symbols AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT symbol
    FROM swap_ohlcv_p
    WHERE '$__all' IN (${symbol:singlequote})
       OR symbol IN (${symbol:singlequote})
),
step_tf AS (
    SELECT * FROM (VALUES
        ('1H', 3600000::bigint),
        ('4H', 14400000::bigint)
    ) AS t(timeframe, step_ms)
),
step_expected AS (
    SELECT s.symbol, st.timeframe, gs AS expected_ts_ms
    FROM selected_symbols s
    CROSS JOIN step_tf st
    CROSS JOIN params p
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL generate_series(
        (floor(extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000 / st.step_ms) * st.step_ms - p.bars_back * st.step_ms)::bigint,
        (floor(extract(epoch FROM now()) * 1000 / st.step_ms) * st.step_ms - st.step_ms)::bigint,
        st.step_ms
    ) AS gs
),
cal_expected AS (
    SELECT s.symbol, '1D' AS timeframe,
        (extract(epoch FROM (date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - (gs.n || ' day')::interval)) * 1000)::bigint AS expected_ts_ms
    FROM selected_symbols s CROSS JOIN params p CROSS JOIN generate_series(1, p.bars_back) AS gs(n)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT s.symbol, '1W' AS timeframe,
        (extract(epoch FROM (date_trunc('week', now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - (gs.n || ' week')::interval)) * 1000)::bigint AS expected_ts_ms
    FROM selected_symbols s CROSS JOIN params p CROSS JOIN generate_series(1, p.bars_back) AS gs(n)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT s.symbol, '1M' AS timeframe,
        (extract(epoch FROM (date_trunc('month', now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - (gs.n || ' month')::interval)) * 1000)::bigint AS expected_ts_ms
    FROM selected_symbols s CROSS JOIN params p CROSS JOIN generate_series(1, p.bars_back) AS gs(n)
),
expected AS (
    SELECT symbol, timeframe, expected_ts_ms FROM step_expected
    UNION ALL
    SELECT symbol, timeframe, expected_ts_ms FROM cal_expected
),
actual AS (
    SELECT e.symbol, e.timeframe,
        count(e.expected_ts_ms) AS expected_rows,
        count(o.timestamp) AS actual_rows,
        max(o.timestamp) AS last_ts_ms
    FROM expected e
    LEFT JOIN swap_ohlcv_p o
        ON o.symbol = e.symbol
       AND o.timeframe = e.timeframe
       AND o.timestamp = e.expected_ts_ms
    GROUP BY e.symbol, e.timeframe
)
SELECT
    timeframe,
    count(*) AS symbols,
    sum(expected_rows) AS expected_rows,
    sum(actual_rows) AS actual_rows,
    sum(expected_rows - actual_rows) AS missing_rows,
    round(100.0 * sum(actual_rows) / nullif(sum(expected_rows), 0), 2) AS fill_pct,
    to_timestamp(min(last_ts_ms) / 1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS min_last_candle_utc,
    to_timestamp(max(last_ts_ms) / 1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS max_last_candle_utc,
    to_timestamp(min(last_ts_ms) / 1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai' AS min_last_candle_cst,
    to_timestamp(max(last_ts_ms) / 1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai' AS max_last_candle_cst
FROM actual
GROUP BY timeframe
ORDER BY fill_pct ASC, timeframe;

panels.title: Candle Coverage by Timeframe

panels.description: Pipeline recovery decisions grouped into lifecycle buckets so terminal symbols do not look like sync failures.

targets.rawSql:
WITH recent AS (
    SELECT
        reason,
        symbol,
        timeframe,
        decision_status,
        created_at,
        safety_payload,
        CASE
            WHEN reason = 'instrument_state_unknown' THEN 'instrument_state_unknown'
            WHEN reason = 'instrument_not_live'
                 AND safety_payload->>'instrument_state' = 'expired' THEN 'expired_terminal'
            WHEN reason = 'bootstrap_state_missing' THEN 'new_live_no_bootstrap'
            ELSE reason
        END AS lifecycle_bucket
    FROM ops.pipeline_recovery_decisions
    WHERE controller_dag_id = 'pipeline_recovery_controller'
      AND created_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
      AND reason IN ('instrument_not_live','instrument_state_unknown','bootstrap_state_missing')
)
SELECT
    lifecycle_bucket,
    count(*) AS decisions,
    count(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbols,
    max(created_at) AS last_seen_utc
FROM recent
GROUP BY lifecycle_bucket
ORDER BY decisions DESC, lifecycle_bucket;

panels.title: Recovery Lifecycle Buckets

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM swap_ohlcv_p ORDER BY 1
